_comment: Configuration for generate_thorne_button_atlas.py. Generates transparency variants of the button source atlas by reading the solid top row and producing 5 additional opacity rows with preserved opaque borders.

output._comment: Updated in-place (same file). 255x255 atlas, 40px cells, 2px gaps.

border._comment: Opaque border width preserved on all transparency variants. Border pixels keep A=255 regardless of row transparency level.

transparency_rows._comment: Alpha values for each row (1-6). Row 1 is the source row (fully opaque, A=255). Rows 2-6 reduce inner opacity while preserving opaque borders. Same levels as the logo atlas for cross-atlas consistency.
